understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked with a '+' on each level without dying, finishing the current level (BP35) and continuing until the game is won, within the turn/attempt limits.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can either MOVE (e.g., left/right/up/down when allowed) or CLICK a specific tile coordinate. Movement shifts the player one tile, but after moving the player is affected by the current gravity (here, DOWN) and will fall until landing on solid support or being stopped by the level geometry. CLICK actions remove the targeted clickable tile (as shown by 'Clickable tiles removed'), which can open gaps and trigger additional falling under gravity; sometimes a click does not move the player immediately unless it changes support beneath/around them. Landing on a spike tile ends the attempt (run failure) and the level restarts; you get 2 attempts per level and a limited number of turns/steps per attempt. Undo, when available, would revert to a previous state/turn, restoring position and tiles to avoid committing to a bad move.
